detail.migration_notes: The source uses mixed wording: some model IDs have exact dates, while Gemini 2.5 IDs are listed as not before October 16, 2026 and gemini-embedding-001 is listed as no sooner than May 20, 2028. APW records the earliest listed lifecycle boundary for alerting and keeps exact-date caveats in limitations.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official lifecycle table reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Track the listed lifecycle dates in model allowlists and agent-routing tests, especially if production workloads still pin Gemini 2.5 or older embedding IDs.
Do not treat the October 16, 2026 date as an exact shutdown; use it as the earliest listed lifecycle boundary and monitor the official page for final retirement updates.

limitations: This event is a planning signal from the reviewed lifecycle table, not a claim that every listed model has the same exact shutdown date.
Google may update final retirement dates; consumers should monitor the official lifecycle page before making irreversible migrations.
summary: Google Cloud's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform model-version page lists future lifecycle dates for Gemini 2.5, Gemini Live native audio, Gemini image, and embedding model IDs, giving developers migration-planning windows for Vertex and agent-platform workloads.
title: Google Cloud Listed Gemini And Embedding Model Lifecycle Dates

detail.change_summary: AWS Step Functions added an AgentCore-powered reasoning step integration that can run managed AgentCore harnesses inside workflows with model, prompt, tool, session, and audit-history behavior changes.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official announcement reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Review Step Functions workflow definitions, approval controls, and agent audit logging before moving AgentCore reasoning steps into production workflows.

estimated_cost_effect.basis: Step Functions workflow execution and Bedrock/AgentCore resources remain separately metered.

impacts.recommended_action: Model total workflow cost using Step Functions execution volume plus Bedrock model inference and AgentCore resource usage.

limitations: APW records the provider-impact surface and metering implications; exact pricing depends on Step Functions, Bedrock, AgentCore, model, and region choices.
summary: AWS announced an AWS Step Functions integration with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore for agentic reasoning steps, including per-invocation model/tool overrides, workflow history, and separate Step Functions plus Bedrock/AgentCore cost surfaces.
title: AWS Step Functions Added AgentCore-Powered Agentic Reasoning Step

examples: Use tools[].max_tokens to cap tool output on short-review workflows.
Classify no-output refusal responses separately from billed completion responses.
detail.new_accounting: Tool definitions can cap output with max_tokens, and Claude API requests that return stop_reason=refusal before output generation are not billed.
detail.old_accounting: Tool calls could produce full-length outputs unless constrained elsewhere; refusal billing needed local invoice verification.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official release notes reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

estimated_cost_effect.basis: official release-note statements about tool max_tokens and no-output refusal billing
estimated_cost_effect.magnitude: bounded tool output and no billing for refusals before output generation

impacts.recommended_action: Set tool max_tokens for workloads that do not need full-length tool responses and update billing attribution for no-output refusals.
Expose tool max_tokens in API wrappers and make refusal billing logic depend on whether output tokens were generated.

limitations: APW records provider-stated billing behavior and does not reconcile invoices.
No raw release-note text is committed.
summary: Anthropic's June 2 Claude Platform release notes list a tool-level max_tokens cap for output control and state that no-output refusal responses on the Claude API are no longer billed.
title: Anthropic Added Tool max_tokens And No-Output Refusal Billing Relief
